What a waste of a game, and a waste of MY hard earned money on a product that is $32 more expensive than it should be."}]}, {"idx": 14, "aspects": []}, {"idx": 15, "aspects": [{"aspect": "game style", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Bannerlord have a style of game that could be the sweet spot between Civ style world/kingdom building with a mix of Total War battles."}, {"aspect": "execution", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "the execution is verging on poor."}, {"aspect": "mods", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "If you want to have any kind of fun then you will absolutely need mods as the base systems and features just arent there. Mods for diplomacy, larger battles and armies are a must."}, {"aspect": "build_variety", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "you can play the game multiple different ways (Merc, Trader, Vassel, Ruler) and its completely open as to how you want your character to play out, it doesnt force you into a specific type."}, {"aspect": "world", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "The world, for the most part, moves pretty consistantly and things constantly change, kingdoms lose towns and castles and armies declare war on you out of the blue."}, {"aspect": "combat", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Battles can be fun and do require some thinking, especially if you find yourself outnumbered."}, {"aspect": "sieges", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Seiges are a great feature"}, {"aspect": "siege control", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "you just lack the ability to control them well."}, {"aspect": "kingdoms", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "The kingdoms are well thought out and styled and the database that is there could very easily be expanded upon and made to be more interactive."}, {"aspect": "writing", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Dialouges are rough and uninteresting, every NPC interaction is identical and repetitive."}, {"aspect": "ai_behavior", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "AI lords and leaders are terrible when it comes to tactics, both in seiges and in battles."}, {"aspect": "wars", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Wars are persistent and sometimes seem pointlessly invoked and when this happens continuously as you are trying to rebuild or work on other things it came become incredibly frustrating."}, {"aspect": "graphics", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Graphics are very poor."}, {"aspect": "towns and villages", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "There is so much potential in the towns and villages if they were more interactive."}, {"aspect": "hideouts", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": [{"idx": 0, "aspects": [{"aspect": "bugs", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "I find it very Glitchy after completing the Quest unwonted guest! the key to free the refugee hostages failed to appear: and early'er on an NPC, by the name mom'a refused dialog before I even got the quest so finishing it doesn't matter cause the key failed to spawn another glitch was at the Circus Clowns Show the enemies respond when I returned to check if I missed something"}]}]

[{"idx": 0, "aspects": [{"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Fun game"}, {"aspect": "graphics", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Visually quite good, as far as isometric turn based rpg strat games go."}, {"aspect": "voice_acting", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Almost all dialogue has quality voice over for them."}, {"aspect": "game_length", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "The game is a bit short, without the DLCs you've got about 30 hours from start to finish."}, {"aspect": "difficulty", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "On higher difficulty settings, if you don't properly plan out your character level ups, you can end up with a real hard end game"}, {"aspect": "build_variety", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "there are some cookie cutter OP builds."}, {"aspect": "combat", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Most of the difficulty comes from sheer chance on your to hit and resist rolls, besides using cover, there is very little actual strategy in combat, that doesn't really change from fight to fight."}, {"aspect": "dlc", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Steeltown DLC adds some crappy new stacking status effects, that are more annoying than interesting to play around with."}, {"aspect": "dlc", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Cult of the holy detonation DLC seems to be a bit lacking in stuff to do, like they wanted to implement more but cut a bunch in the end."}]}]
